A.does: On validation failure, automatically aborts the request chain and writes an HTTP 400 response by delegating to MustBindWith.

B.does: On validation failure, returns the error to the caller without writing any response or aborting the handler chain, by delegating to ShouldBindWith.

comparison: Use Bind when you want Gin to handle the 400 response automatically; use ShouldBind when you need to inspect the error and decide the response yourself.
